case_title: THELMA ESTRADA MORALES VS. TEMPO TELECOM LLC

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT TEMPO TELECOM LLC
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/22/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $379.99 FILED BY MORALES, THELMA ESTRADA AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPO TELECOM LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, THELMA ESTRADA AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPO TELECOM LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATION SERVICE) SERVED DEC-04-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPO TELECOM LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-24-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
